title: Nagaichuvai Gallatta
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Thirai Thendral
subTitle: The host engages in a meaningful conversation with the viewers and plays Tamil movie songs on their requests.

title: Sugamana Ragangal
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of popular melodious songs composed and performed by various renowned artists played back to back.

title: Bhakthi Padalgal
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of popular devotional songs in praise of deities performed by eminent artists is played back-to-back.

title: Aalaya Vazhipadu
subTitle: A religious scholar sheds light on the history behind various temples, as well as the significance and meaning of diverse rituals and customs.

title: Aanmeega Kadhaigal
subTitle: A religious leader sheds light on various teachings and principles from the Hindu scriptures and encourages followers to reflect on the same.

title: Nalla Kaalam Pirakuthu
subTitle: A renowned astrologer provides a comprehensive insight into the position of stars and makes astrological predictions for the 12 zodiac signs.

title: News
subTitle: The host provides the latest information, advancements, and developments regarding various political, economic and social issues.

title: Vanakkam Thamizha
subTitle: The hosts interact with renowned personalities and also present the latest updates from across the globe, ranging from entertainment to technology.

title: Ramayanam
subTitle: Lord Rama and various other figures in Valmiki's Ramayana and Tulsidas's 'Ramcharitmanas' go through trials and tribulations to achieve their goals and protect their loved ones.

title: Singapenne
subTitle: Anandi, a village belle, embarks on a solo journey to fulfil her duties as a daughter and shoulder the responsibilities of her family.

title: Ethirneechal
subTitle: Janani and the women of the household embark on a journey to pursue their ambitions in the wake of Aadhimuthu Gunasekaran's downfall, while navigating the challenges of society.

title: Poongodi
subTitle: Poongodi's quest for self-establishment leads her to Saravanan, a man unwittingly controlled by his stepmother's manipulative ways.

title: Punitha
subTitle: A loving bond between Maragatham and her step-daughter, Punitha, goes awry when she falls in love with Kabilan, altering their lives.

title: Manamagale Vaa
subTitle: Narmada wants to fix her family, and Kathir needs to find husbands for his sisters. Soon, they fall in love while fighting a common enemy.

title: Vinodhini
subTitle: After her husband disappears in a military accident, Vinodhini remains resilient and hopeful of his return. However, her journey is fraught with hardship as she takes care of her family.

title: Puthu Vasantham
subTitle: While the parents search for a suitable prospect for their daughter Selvi's marriage, she expresses her desire to get married to a joint family.

title: Lakshmi
subTitle: Maha, her family's primary breadwinner, wants to keep supporting her family even after marrying Selvam. However, things become complicated as obstacles test their family bonds and marriage.
